'''Tsillin Wel''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] working with [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]], and specialized in tracking accounts used by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] to pay their operatives, [[Spy/Legends|spies]], and other ancillary agents. She was brought in to testify during [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu's]] [[Treason/Legends|treason]] and murder [[Trial of Tycho Celchu|trial]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. She testified in regard to the fifteen million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] that was deposited in a total of six accounts that supposedly belonged to Tycho in an attempt to paint him as a turncoat in the employ of [[Ysanne Isard]].
